x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: A simple app to type int he contents of your clipboard

options.name: --delay
options.description: The amount of time (in seconds) to wait before reading the clipboard and typing [default: 3]

options.name: --content
options.description: The content to type rather than using the clipboard

options.name: --append-new-line
options.description: Appends a new line (Enter) key at the end of the content

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Prints additional information to the console

options.name: --fast-typing
options.description: Removes the delay between key strokes
